title: Northern Hemisphere temperature anomaly around the Tambora eruption (°C vs 1961-1990 baseline)

source.name: Northern Hemisphere Temperature Reconstruction (Oppenheimer 2003 review)
source.publisher: Reviews of Geophysics / American Geophysical Union

notes: Illustrative; approximate temperature anomaly values relative to 1961-1990 baseline, based on published dendrochronological and historical reconstructions. Tambora erupted April 1815.
